metadata.description: A unique  application/solution name for all resources in this deployment. This should be 3-20 characters long:
Optional. A unique text value for the solution.
Optional: Existing Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID
Use this parameter to use an existing AI project resource ID
Optional. created by user name
Choose the programming language:
Industry use case for deployment:
Secondary location for databases creation(example:eastus2):
Location for AI services deployment. This is the location where the Search service resource will be deployed.
GPT model deployment type:
Name of the GPT model to deploy:
Version of the GPT model to deploy:
Capacity of the GPT deployment:
Name of the Text Embedding model to deploy:
Capacity of the Embedding Model deployment
Deploy the application components (Cosmos DB, API, Frontend). Set to true to deploy the app.
Set to true for workshop deployment with sample data and simplified configuration.
Set to true to deploy Azure SQL Server, otherwise Fabric SQL is used.
Enable chat history.
The primary title displayed in the header of the web app (bold text).
The secondary title displayed in the header of the web app (lighter text).
Enable user access token forwarding to the API.
Set to true to auto-create a Fabric workspace during post-provision. When false, capacity creation is skipped.
Optional. Name of an existing Fabric capacity to reuse. If empty, a new capacity is auto-created when conditions are met.
Optional. SKU tier of the Fabric capacity resource.
Optional. Additional user/service principal object IDs to assign as Fabric Capacity admins.
Location for AI Foundry deployment. This is the location where the AI Foundry resources will be deployed.
Name of the Azure Container Registry
The principal type of the deploying user. Use ServicePrincipal for CI/CD pipelines with OIDC.

variables.landingText: [if(equals(parameters('usecase'), 'Retail-sales-analysis'), 'You can ask questions around sales, products and orders.', 'You can ask questions around customer policies, claims and communications.')]

properties.tags: [union(variables('existingTags'), createObject('TemplateName', 'Unified Data Analysis Agents', 'CreatedBy', parameters('createdBy'), 'DeploymentName', deployment().name, 'Type', 'Non-WAF'))]

The name of the solution, used as a base for naming all resources.

variables.aiModelDeployments: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', parameters('gptModelName'), 'model', parameters('gptModelName'), 'sku', createObject('name', parameters('deploymentType'), 'capacity', parameters('gptDeploymentCapacity')), 'version', parameters('gptModelVersion'), 'raiPolicyName', 'Microsoft.Default')), if(parameters('isWorkshop'), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('embeddingModel'), 'model', parameters('embeddingModel'), 'sku', createObject('name', 'GlobalStandard', 'capacity', parameters('embeddingDeploymentCapacity')), 'version', '1', 'raiPolicyName', 'Microsoft.Default')), createArray()))]

metadata.description: The endpoint URL for the Azure OpenAI service.

aiServicesTarget.value: [if(not(empty(variables('existingOpenAIEndpoint'))), variables('existingOpenAIEndpoint'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('aiServicesName')), '2025-12-01').endpoints['OpenAI Language Model Instance API'])]
